title: CMS INDUSLAW acts on Plum ₹193 crore Series B fundraise
description: Plum Benefits Private Limited, a employee health benefits platform, has raised ₹193 crore from a Series B fundraise led by Peak XV Partners, with participation from Tanglin Venture Partners and GMO Venture Partners.CMS INDUSLAW advised Plum on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted of Winnie Shekhar (Partner), Shantanu Singh (Partner), Ravin Abhyankar (Senior Associate) and Shubham S Agrawal (Associate).Winnie Shekhar, Shantanu SinghPlum enables organisations to provide integrated insuran
